message:
fix: mouse input parsing with manual byte reading

- Fix struct alignment issues by parsing mouse messages manually
- Mouse button: [x:f64][y:f64][button:u8][state:u8][mods:u8] = 19 bytes
- Mouse move: [x:f64][y:f64][mods:u8] = 17 bytes
- Mouse scroll: [x:f64][y:f64][dx:f64][dy:f64][mods:u8] = 33 bytes
- Fix coordinate calculation to use CSS points instead of device pixels
